narrative: npm led with 86% of weekly downloads. Top package: @world-forge/schema (339 this week). Top gainer: @world-forge/schema (+2508%; Δ326). Concentration: top 5 = 49.5%. Data is partial (degraded: npm) (3 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 86% of 2,874 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (14%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 49.5% of weekly downloads. Moderate concentration in top packages.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: npm) (3 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.86 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 86% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 3 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/core, @ai-rpg-engine/character-creation, @ai-rpg-engine/equipment show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 30 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @world-forge/schema, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/renderer-2d.

recommendations.title: 2 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp, @mcptoolshop/claude-guardian. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 77 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: tool-compass, mcpt, file-compass, backpropagate, nullout-mcp scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.86 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 86% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
